meta.title: SnapAlert — Screenshot-Based URL Monitoring
meta.description: Monitor any webpage for visual changes. Get notified via Telegram when prices drop, reports update, or content changes. AI-powered screenshot comparison.

hero.title: Monitor Any Webpage.
hero.subtitle: Track prices, financial reports, government filings, and any webpage changes — powered by AI screenshot comparison. No coding required.

trust.title: Currently in Alpha
trust.subtitle: Free to use while we build. Early users will get perks when we launch.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to start monitoring any webpage

step1.title: Add a URL
step1.description: Send any URL to the bot in Telegram. It takes an initial screenshot and starts tracking.

step2.title: AI Detects Changes
step2.description: Screenshots are compared using pixel diff and AI analysis. Only real changes trigger alerts.

step3.title: Get Notified
step3.description: Receive before/after screenshots with an AI summary of exactly what changed.

useCases.title: What Can You Monitor?
useCases.subtitle: Works on any publicly accessible webpage. Here are some real examples:

price.title: Price Tracking
price.description: Monitor product pages on Amazon, eBay, or any e-commerce store for price drops and stock changes.

finance.title: Financial Reports
finance.description: Track US Treasury yields, bond rates, and economic indicators from official sources.

sec.title: SEC & IPO Filings
sec.description: Watch SEC EDGAR for new 10-K filings, IPO registrations, and regulatory updates.

government.title: Government & Policy
government.description: Monitor government pages for policy updates, regulation changes, or official announcements.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about SnapAlert
faq.q1: How does AI-based change detection work?
faq.a1: We take periodic screenshots of your monitored URLs and compare them using both pixel-level diff and AI vision analysis. This means we catch visual changes that simple HTML monitoring would miss — like dynamic content, images, and rendered charts.
faq.q2: Is there a limit on the free plan?
faq.a2: The free plan includes 5 URLs and 150 checks per month. That is enough for daily monitoring of your most important pages. You can upgrade anytime if you need more capacity.
faq.q3: What types of pages can I monitor?
faq.a3: Any publicly accessible webpage works — e-commerce product pages, government sites, financial dashboards, SEC filings, news sites, and more. If you can open it in a browser, we can monitor it.
faq.q4: How quickly will I be notified of changes?
faq.a4: Detection time depends on your plan and check frequency. On paid plans, checks can run as frequently as every few minutes. You will receive a Telegram notification with before/after screenshots and an AI summary within seconds of detection.

pricing.title: Free During Alpha
pricing.subtitle: We're in early access. Use the bot for free with these limits. Paid plans with more capacity are coming soon — early users will get bonuses.

footer.tagline: AI-powered webpage monitoring via Telegram. Currently in alpha.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How SnapAlert collects, uses, and protects your data.
privacy.intro: SnapAlert ("we", "us", "the Service") is a Telegram bot that monitors webpages for visual changes using screenshot comparison. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights. We keep it short and honest.

collect.title: What We Collect
collect.intro: We collect only the data necessary to provide the monitoring service:

telegram.title: From your Telegram account
telegram.item1: Telegram user ID (numeric identifier assigned by Telegram)
telegram.item2: Display name (first name, last name) and username

monitoring.title: From your monitoring activity
monitoring.item4: Change detection history and notification delivery status

landing.title: On the landing page
landing.description: We use Umami, a self-hosted, cookie-free analytics tool, to understand how visitors interact with this website. Umami does not collect personal data, does not use cookies, and does not track you across sites. All analytics data stays on our own servers.

use.title: How We Use Your Data
use.item1: To take screenshots of URLs you submit and detect visual changes
use.item2: To send you Telegram notifications when changes are detected
use.item3: To generate AI-powered summaries of what changed on the page
use.item4: To enforce usage limits (URLs per user, checks per month)

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.intro: To provide screenshot comparison and change analysis, we send page screenshots to:
thirdParty.item1: Google Gemini API — for AI-based visual change detection and summary generation
thirdParty.item2: OpenAI API — as an alternative AI provider for change analysis
thirdParty.item3: ScrapingBee / Zyte — optional cloud screenshot services used as fallbacks when local capture is unavailable
thirdParty.note: Only screenshots of the monitored pages are sent to these services — not your personal data. We do not sell or share your personal information with anyone.

storage.title: Data Storage
storage.description: All data is stored in a PostgreSQL database on our servers. Screenshots are stored as binary data in the database. We do not use third-party data warehouses or cloud storage for your personal data.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: We do not use cookies. The Telegram bot operates entirely through the Telegram API. The landing page uses Umami analytics which is cookie-free by design.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.item1: Request a copy of all data we store about you
rights.item2: Request deletion of your account and all associated data
rights.item3: Stop monitoring by removing URLs or blocking the bot on Telegram
rights.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at the email below.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.description: We may update this policy as the service evolves. Significant changes will be communicated via the bot or this page. The "last updated" date at the top reflects the most recent revision.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For privacy-related questions or data requests, email us at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms and conditions for using SnapAlert.
terms.intro: By using SnapAlert ("the Service"), you agree to these terms. The Service is a Telegram bot that monitors publicly accessible webpages for visual changes and notifies you via Telegram.

service.title: What the Service Does
service.description: SnapAlert periodically takes screenshots of URLs you provide, compares them to detect visual changes, and sends you Telegram notifications with before/after screenshots and an AI-generated summary of what changed.

alpha.title: Alpha Status
alpha.description: The Service is currently in alpha. It is provided free of charge with no guaranteed uptime, accuracy, or feature completeness. Features may change, break, or be removed without notice. We may reset data or modify limits as we develop the product.

acceptable.title: Acceptable Use
acceptable.intro: You agree not to use the Service to:
acceptable.item1: Monitor pages you are not authorized to access
acceptable.item2: Attempt to circumvent rate limits or usage restrictions
acceptable.item3: Use the Service for any illegal purpose or to facilitate illegal activity
acceptable.item4: Overload the Service with excessive requests or automated abuse

limits.title: Free Tier Limits
limits.item1: Up to 5 monitored URLs per account
limits.item3: These limits may change as the Service evolves

content.title: Monitored Content
content.description: You are responsible for the URLs you submit. The Service takes screenshots of publicly accessible webpages — we do not control or endorse the content of those pages. Screenshots are stored for comparison purposes and may be processed by AI services as described in our Privacy Policy.

availability.title: Availability
availability.description: We aim to keep the Service running, but we do not guarantee uptime. The Service may be unavailable due to maintenance, infrastructure issues, or other reasons. Detection timing depends on check frequency and is not real-time.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.description: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for missed changes, false positives, delayed notifications, or any decisions you make based on the Service's output. Do not rely on SnapAlert as your sole source of information for time-critical or financial decisions.

termination.title: Account and Termination
termination.description: We may suspend or terminate your access if you violate these terms or abuse the Service. You can stop using the Service at any time by removing your monitored URLs or blocking the bot on Telegram. Upon termination, we may delete your data.

changes.title: Changes to These Terms
changes.description: We may update these terms as the Service evolves. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance. Significant changes will be communicated via the bot or this page.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For questions about these terms, email us at
